utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final package:
1. destination – included (Barcelona, Spain) ✅
2. travel_dates – included with specific departure and return dates ✅
3. transportation – included with detailed flight info (cities, airline type, class, price, eco_certified) and local transport with provider, type, and price ✅
4. accommodation – fully detailed (name, type, check-in/out, nights, total_price, eco_certified, eco_rating, meal_plan) ✅
5. activities – two activities listed with names, types, prices, and eco_certified flags ✅
6. additional_services – included, restaurant with name, cuisine_type, average_meal_cost, eco_certified ✅
7. total_budget – included with cost breakdown ✅
All 7 required items are fully covered with all necessary details.
